info.title: Restaurant API
info.description: Unified API contract for auth, staff, menu, orders, and tables endpoints.

post.summary: Generate password reset token for existing account

200.description: Always returns generic message; resetToken is non-production only

post.summary: Register a new public staff account

get.summary: Get all menu items (WAITER, BARTENDER, MANAGER)
Get menu item by id (WAITER, BARTENDER, MANAGER)
Get order by id (WAITER or MANAGER)

post.summary: Add menu item to order (WAITER or MANAGER)

patch.description: Manager can reset another user without currentPassword. Non-manager can update only own password and must provide currentPassword.

get.summary: Get table by id (MANAGER or WAITER)
Sales grouped by menu category (MANAGER only)

ResetPasswordBadRequest.description: Validation error or invalid/expired reset token
